description: Aggregate HRIV usage analytics for decision makers, built from structured usage/auth logs in Loki. All panels are aggregate-only: no named-user panels are provisioned (see the 'Privacy & scope' panel). Synthetic-monitor traffic is excluded via the server-marked synthetic flag.

options.content:
## HRIV Usage and Experience

Aggregate usage analytics from structured logs (Loki). **No named-user panels are provisioned** because Grafana dashboard provisioning is broadly readable. Per-user investigation remains an ad-hoc, access-controlled log workflow.

Synthetic-monitor journeys are excluded via the server-marked `event_synthetic` / `auth_synthetic` fields. Usage-event panels also exclude the client hint `event_client_synthetic` to remove historical events created before the synthetic account metadata was corrected. The **User role** variable filters usage-event panels; authentication panels stay aggregate because some failure paths do not carry a resolved role.

> Field names assume OTLP→Loki ingestion, which sanitizes attribute dots to underscores (for example `event.name` → `event_name`).

Usage and authentication events are emitted authoritatively by the backend and are selected from the `service_name="hriv-backend"` OTLP log stream.

panels.title: Privacy & scope
panels.description: Scope, caveats, and drill-down guidance for this dashboard.

targets.expr: count(sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name=~"navigation.page_changed|image.view.ready" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Active users
panels.description: Distinct authenticated users who generated page-view or image-ready events in the selected period.

targets.expr: count(sum by (browser_tab_session_id) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range])))

panels.title: Sessions
panels.description: Distinct browser-tab session identifiers seen in the selected period.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | auth_outcome="success" | auth_synthetic!="true" [$__range]))

panels.title: Successful logins
panels.description: Successful logins across supported authentication methods, excluding synthetic accounts.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | auth_outcome="failure" | auth_synthetic!="true" [$__range]))

panels.title: Failed logins
panels.description: Failed login attempts in the selected period, excluding synthetic accounts. These remain aggregate because some failures do not resolve to an application role.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.view.ready" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Successful image views
panels.description: Image open completions reported by the frontend telemetry pipeline.

targets.expr: count(sum by (image_id) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.view.ready" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | image_id!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Unique images viewed
panels.description: Distinct image identifiers successfully opened during the selected period.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.view.ready" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range])) / sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name=~"image.view.ready|image.view.failed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Image-view success rate
panels.description: Successful image opens divided by successful plus failed image-open attempts. A blank panel means there were no matching image-open attempts in the selected range.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="navigation.page_changed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Page hits
panels.description: Navigation page-change events from real users.

targets.expr: sum by (event_page) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="navigation.page_changed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Page hits over time (by page)
panels.description: Navigation activity split by page identifier over time.

targets.expr: sum by (user_role) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Activity by role
panels.description: Usage-event volume split by application role.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.view.ready" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto]))
sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.view.failed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Image views vs failures
panels.description: Image-open completions versus failures over time.

targets.expr: sum by (client_browser_family) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | client_browser_family!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: Browser family
panels.description: Browser-family distribution for real-user telemetry.

targets.expr: sum by (client_browser_family, client_browser_major) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | client_browser_family!="" | client_browser_major!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: Browser major by family
panels.description: Major browser versions grouped by browser family (for example: chrome 149).

targets.expr: sum by (client_os_family) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | client_os_family!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: OS family
panels.description: Operating-system-family distribution for real-user telemetry.

targets.expr: sum by (client_device_class) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | client_device_class!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: Device class
panels.description: Desktop/mobile/tablet split for real-user telemetry.

targets.expr: sum by (client_viewport_bucket) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | client_viewport_bucket!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: Viewport bucket
panels.description: Viewport bucket captured at session start.

targets.expr: sum by (client_touch_capable) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name!="" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Touch capability
panels.description: Whether the client environment reported touch capability.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (image_id) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.view.ready" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | image_id!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Top images (by views)
panels.description: Most-viewed image identifiers for the selected period.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (category_id) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name=~"image.view.ready|navigation.page_changed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | category_id!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Top categories (by activity)
panels.description: Most-active category identifiers from navigation and successful image views.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.upload.completed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | unwrap event_value [$__range]))

panels.title: Images uploaded
panels.description: Total files uploaded (bulk uploads count each file), excluding synthetic accounts.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="category.created" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Categories created
panels.description: New categories created in the selected period, excluding synthetic accounts.

targets.expr: sum by (upload_mode) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.upload.completed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Uploads over time (by mode)
panels.description: Upload interactions split by single vs bulk mode.

targets.expr: sum by (file_type) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.upload.completed" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | file_type!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: Uploaded file types
panels.description: Bounded file-type buckets of uploads ('mixed' = multi-type batch).

targets.expr: avg by (user_role) (avg_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="image.view.ended" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" | unwrap event_duration_ms [$__auto]))

panels.title: Image dwell time by role (avg)
panels.description: Average time from opening an image to leaving it, per role.

targets.expr: sum by (user_role) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="application.session_heartbeat" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto])) * 5

panels.title: Active session time by role (heartbeats)
panels.description: Approximate active minutes per role; each heartbeat represents ~5 minutes of a visible, authenticated tab.

targets.expr: sum by (event_action) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="ui.toolbar_action" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Toolbar actions
panels.description: Image-viewer toolbar button usage for the selected period.

targets.expr: sum by (event_action) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="annotation.created" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Annotations created (by type)
panels.description: Canvas annotations created, split by annotation type.

targets.expr: sum by (event_page) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="application.session_started" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Session landing page
panels.description: First page of each tab session — where users go after login.

targets.expr: sum by (event_action, error_code) (count_over_time({service_name="hriv-backend"} | event_name="frontend.error" | event_synthetic!="true" | event_client_synthetic!="true" | user_role=~"${user_role}" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Frontend errors by triggering action and code
panels.description: Frontend error events split by the action that triggered them and the bounded error code.

title: HRIV Usage and Experience
